title: Warczewiczella discolor

Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The bioactive constituents of Warczewiczella discolor include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal properties.
